label: Ammonium
definition:
Variable Short Name: NH4

Data Source:  Atmospheric Composition Analysis Group (https://sites.wustl.edu/acag/datasets/))

Spatial Scale: 0.01deg

Temporal Scale: 1-month/2-week

Years Available: 2000-2022

Model: Geographically weighted regression (satellites, chemical transport models, and monitors)

Model Specification/Citation: https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acs.est.8b06392, https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acsestair.4c00151
